name: manual.md
description: The NOMAD user manual and guide in markdown format

name: 2048.com
description: A simple version of the 2048 game, where the aim is to get 2048 on a single tile

name: access.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add accessibility options to your device, such as: high contrast theme, focus indicators, colour blind options and various font options

name: aid.com
description: An off-grid first aid guide, including information for treating a variety of wounds with quicklinks to sections

name: ascii.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add ASCII title to the main screen, purely aesthetic

name: backup.ext
description: A NOMAD extension which adds a backup button to the options menu to download all files in a single zip

name: calndr.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add a calendar and schedule to the main screen

name: chat.com
description: An official chat client for NOMAD hosted by DimensionDevices.co.uk. WiFi connection to NOMAD is required

name: chip8.com
description: A Chip8 console emulator that supports loading of .ch8 files from your client device (phone etc)

name: cipher.com
description: A message encryption routine to encrypt messages using a secret key that may then be shared via whatever means you want to use

name: clock.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for a customisable clock on the main screen

name: cyber.com
description: A nice looking interactive Cyberdeck like interface

name: dsktop.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension to change the main screen into a hybrid icon/drawer layout

name: diary.com
description: A simple journal style app allowing you to store information on an adhoc basis

name: doom.com
description: A version of Doom, WiFi is required to download the game data

name: emoji.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for an emoji picker for the LoRa messenger

name: flappy.com
description: A simple Flappy Bird clone

name: font.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to replace the font with a custom DataURL .WOFF2 font

name: forum.com
description: An official forum for talking about NOMAD

name: glass.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension for an experimental glass theme

name: graphs.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to extend the stats panel to include colour and realtime graphs

name: go.com
description: A 1 or 2 player implementation of the game Go (with VERY simple computer turns)

name: hacker.thm
description: A NOMAD theme to make the interface look like a retro hacker terminal

name: horo.com
description: A simple horoscope generator

name: hotmap.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for a Node heatmap

name: jumper.com
description: A simple fast paced, albeit basic, platformer

name: kidmod.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension that replaces the entire front end with a child-friendly file list with no options, all file management must be done through the /config panel

name: kiosk.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension that shows information as a kiosk style interface

name: launch.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension which replaces the default user interface with a mobile-app style icon interface

name: lock.ext
description: A NOMAD extension that completely locks down the user iterface, only the /config panel is accessible. To remove this extension you must delete it from the /config panel directly

name: code.ext
description: A NOMAD extension adds a code-lock to the app page. Default password is 1337, change in the code to what you want

name: log.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for user interaction logging

name: lstore.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for managing localStorage on your device

name: mandal.com
description: A simple Mandala image generator

name: maze.com
description: A 3D simple interactive maze game (best played in landscape screen orientation)

name: mcrypt.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add message encryption to the LoRa messenger

name: midi.com
description: A simple midi music sequencer to create old school sounds

name: notes.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for note keeping

name: ovrlay.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for a nice blended image overlay. WiFi connection is required

name: prticl.ext
description: A NOMAD extension which overlays interactive particle animation over the mains screen

name: pi.com
description: 20,000 digits of Pi, great for testing

name: pie.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add pie charts to the main screen for stats

name: pinned.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to pin (embed) a URL or file to the main screen

name: prot.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for scanning files for nefarious activity

name: qr.com
description: QR Code generator

name: racer.com
description: A fast endless drift-racer with obstacles and powerups

name: recipe.com
description: A simple recipe/cookbook book for NOMAD

name: sdebar.thm
description: A NOMAD theme extension to replace the layout with a sidebar

name: shop.com
description: An example of a shop that uses data storage on NOMAD via a .com file with simple styles

name: sounds.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add sounds to the web ui for events and actions

name: stats.ext
description: A NOMAD extension add stat collection for various things

name: stock.com
description: A basic inventory/stock management app, great for off-grid communities

name: storms.com
description: A text-based guide to extreme weather survival

name: sunny.com
description: A simple internet weather API caller using OpenWeatherMap.org

name: synth.com
description: A midi sounding audio synth

name: tamago.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for a little virtual pet, keep it happy by interacting with it and finding new nodes!

name: tapper.com
description: A very simple incremental/idle game

name: tarot.com
description: A simple interactive and animated tarot card reader

name: tasks.com
description: A basic off-grid tasks list system

name: termnl.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add a terminal style view to the main screen

name: theme.ext
description: A NOMAD customisable theme extension

name: times.com
description: A timezone convertor

name: tmzone.com
description: A NOMAD extension for a timezone display on the main screen

name: todo.com
description: A simple todo list

name: tron.com
description: A Tron-style surrounding game

name: units.com
description: A length/volume/unit convertor

name: upload.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for a quick upload button on the main screen

name: warns.ext
description: A NOMAD extension to add warnings on the main screen for low storage space and duty cycle limit

name: wifi.ext
description: A NOMAD extension for WiFi debugging
